title: Explosions reported
description: Ukraine approves NEO-1 bomb disposal robot capable of detecting mines and grenades The NEO-1, a robotic hardware and software system for remote detection of explosive devices, has been officially approved for service in Ukraine's defence forces. Read the full article on our website

title: Moscow is still protected by a missile defense system with nuclear...
title_en: Moscow is still protected by a missile defense system with nuclear...
title_uk: Москву досі захищає система ПРО з ядерним...
description: Moscow is still protected by a missile defense system with nuclear warheads, — Defense Express The capital of the Russian Federation remains the only region covered by a full-fledged A-135 "Amur" strategic missile defense system since the time of the USSR. It was created for decades with one goal — to protect Moscow and the top leadership of the country in the event of a nuclear war. The most unusual thing in this system is anti-missile missiles with nuclear warheads....
description_en: Moscow is still protected by a missile defense system with nuclear warheads, — Defense Express The capital of the Russian Federation remains the only region covered by a full-fledged A-135 "Amur" strategic missile defense system since the time of the USSR. It was created for decades with one goal — to protect Moscow and the top leadership of the country in the event of a nuclear war. The most unusual thing in this system is anti-missile missiles with nuclear warheads....
description_uk: москву до сих пор защищает система ПРО с ядерными боеголовками, — Defense Express Столица рф остается единственным регионом, который еще со времен СССР прикрывает полноценная система стратегической ПРО А-135 «Амур». Ее создавали десятилетиями с одной целью — защитить москву и высшее руководство страны в случае ядерной войны. Самое необычное в этой системе — противоракеты с ядерными боеголовками....

title: Mariupol: Power outage reported
description: Russian-occupied Mariupol port no longer operational after Ukrainian strikes, Azov says. As a result of the attack, the port was left without power, significantly disrupting Russian military logistics in occupied southern Ukraine, the Azov Corps said.
description_en: Russian-occupied Mariupol port no longer operational after Ukrainian strikes, Azov says. As a result of the attack, the port was left without power, significantly disrupting Russian military logistics in occupied southern Ukraine, the Azov Corps said.

title: Kherson: Attack attack
description: Update: Chonhar Bridge connecting occupied Kherson Oblast and Crimea destroyed, official says. Andrii Kovalenko, head of Ukraine’s Center for Countering Disinformation, reported on June 10 that the strategic bridge was destroyed following a June 9 strike. Satellite imagery published by Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty’s “Schemes” project also confirmed damage from a previous attack on June 7,...

title: Kharkiv: 207 drones intercepted
description: 6 killed, 60 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day as Kharkiv targeted for 2nd day in a row. The Air Force said Russia launched 207 drones, 181 of which were intercepted. At least 21 drones struck 14 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 13 sites.
description_en: 6 killed, 60 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day as Kharkiv targeted for 2nd day in a row. The Air Force said Russia launched 207 drones, 181 of which were intercepted. At least 21 drones struck 14 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 13 sites.

title: Energy infrastructure hit

title: Drone strike
description: We continue to apply Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russian military facilities and the oil industry. In particular, this night Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingos hit a military factory in Cheboksary, which supplies the occupying army with components for drones and missiles. Thank you ZSU for the accuracy! The Kuibyshevsky oil refinery in the Samara region was also hit last night. The distance from the front line is...

Зокрема, цієї ночі українські FP-5 Flamingo влучили у воєнний завод у Чебоксарах, який забезпечує армію окупанта компонентами для дронів і ракет. Дякую ЗСУ за влучність! Уражено також за минулу ніч нафтопереробний завод «Куйбишевський» у Самарському регіоні. Відстань від лінії фронту –...

title: Kyiv: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Ukraine's race to winter: a 5.4-billion-euro plan, and a problem paying for it As Russian drones and missiles continue to pound Ukraine's war-damaged energy infrastructure, Kyiv is struggling to find funding for a 5.4 billion euro ($6.2 billion) "energy resilience plan" first announced in spring. title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Ukraine has created its own analogue of Patriot missiles and has already conducted the first tests, — FT Company Fire Point reported on the successful first flight tests of the FP-7.x missile, designed to intercept ballistic missiles and drones. According to the developers, one such missile will cost about $700,000 compared to approximately $3.8 million for the Patriot PAC-3. Production is planned to start already in August, and...

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Update: Ukrainian missiles, drones reportedly hit oil refinery, manufacturing site in long-range strikes on Russia. An oil refinery in the Russian city of Samara was struck by Ukrainian drones, and a manufacturing facility in Cheboksary was struck by missiles overnight on June 10, social media channels reported.

title: Kyiv: Missile strike
description: Update: Russian military official killed in car bombing outside Moscow, media reports. The victim of a car bombing outside Moscow has been identified as Damir Davydov, a Russian military official responsible for missile and artillery ammunition supplies, according to Russian investigative outlet The Insider.

title: Mariupol: Drone strike
description: Ukraine strikes ammo depot in Russia's Belgorod Oblast, confirms fuel tank destruction near Mariupol. In its latest update, the General Staff said Ukrainian forces struck an ammunition depot, command posts, drone control centers, logistics hubs, and troop concentrations across Russia and occupied Ukraine on June 8 and overnight into June 9.

In its latest update, the General Staff said Ukrainian forces struck an ammunition depot, command posts, drone control centers, logistics hubs, and troop concentrations across Russia and occupied Ukraine on June 8 and overnight into June 9.
